# Cadbull

> Cadbull is the world's largest online library offering 270,000+ free and premium 2D/3D AutoCAD drawings, DWG blocks, Revit models, SketchUp (SKP) files, 3D Max, and architectural templates.

This document serves as an enterprise-grade structured map and index for AI agents, LLM search engines, and autonomous crawlers seeking high-quality CAD resources, blueprints, design components, and engineering assets.

---

## AI Search & Discovery Guide

Instead of crawling 200,000+ individual products in real-time, AI agents can query the Cadbull database dynamically using our standardized URL routing parameters:

- **Keywords Search API**: Construct search queries directly using the format:
  `https://cadbull.com/categories/search?search={search_term}`
  - *Example (House Plan)*: `https://cadbull.com/categories/search?search=2BHK+house+plan`
  - *Example (Concrete Detail)*: `https://cadbull.com/categories/search?search=concrete+footing+detail`
- **File Format Filtering**: Filter the entire database by CAD file type using:
  `https://cadbull.com/categories/1?file_type={format}`
  - *Supported formats (`{format}` value)*: `DWG` (AutoCAD), `3d sketchup` (SKP), `3d max` (MAX), `Revit`, `DXF`, `PDF`

---

## Core System Navigation

- [Homepage](https://cadbull.com/) - Live search engine and featured CAD drawings of the day.
- [All Categories Directory](https://cadbull.com/categories) - High-level landing page for all architectural domains.
- [Pricing & Plans](https://cadbull.com/pricing) - Gold memberships, daily download allowances, and license conditions.
- [Help Center & FAQs](https://cadbull.com/faqs) - Structured questions on DWG usage, licensing terms, and upload approvals.
- [Contact Support](https://cadbull.com/contact-us) - Form for custom design drafting services and custom CAD details.

---

## Primary CAD Categories & Subcategories

Browse the hierarchical structural tree of Cadbull's 50+ specialized engineering and drafting domains:

### 1. [CAD Architecture](https://cadbull.com/Cad-Architecture)
Comprehensive design layouts for residential, commercial, and public spaces:
* **[House Plans](https://cadbull.com/Architecture-House-Plan-CAD-Drawings)** - Small plans, multi-story apartments, luxury villas, and elevations.
* **Sections & Elevations** - Full building vertical cuts, exterior design details, and wall sections.
* **Openings** - Standard and luxury door drawings, window blocks, and gate details.
* **Vertical Circulation** - Wooden stairs, steel elevators, spiral staircase blocks, and ramps.

### 2. [Interior Design](https://cadbull.com/Interior-design)
Detailed drawing blueprints for indoor layouts and room detailing:
* **Kitchen Layouts** - Modular kitchen blocks, kitchen cabinets, platform setups, and sink details.
* **Bedroom & Bath** - Wardrobes, washrooms, bathroom accessory layouts, and shower details.
* **Ceiling & Wall** - Gypsum false ceiling details, wall cladding blocks, and decorative trims.
* **[AutoCAD Furniture Blocks](https://cadbull.com/Autocad-Furniture-Blocks--&-DWG-Models)** - Sofa blocks, office chairs, dining tables, and beds.

### 3. [Structure Detail](https://cadbull.com/Structure-detail)
Load-bearing and civil engineering drafting details:
* **Foundations** - Pile foundations, isolated footings, strip footings, and retaining wall schematics.
* **Reinforced Concrete** - Column bar schedules, beam details, slab steel grids, and joints.
* **Steel Construction** - Steel roof trusses, bolted joints, welded joints, and industrial portal frames.

### 4. [DWG Blocks](https://cadbull.com/DWG-Blocks)
Ready-to-use vector blocks and symbols to speed up design workflows:
* **Vegetation & Landscaping** - Tree top-views, plants, garden pots, and landscape flowers.
* **Vehicles & People** - Cars, trucks, bus blocks, bicycle vectors, and human silhouette views.
* **Symbols & Legends** - North points, drawing title bars, dimension scales, and electrical legends.

### 5. [CAD Landscape](https://cadbull.com/Cad-Landscaping)
Outdoor planning and civic site design drawings:
* **Urban Parks** - Public park layouts, kids' play areas, walking track designs, and fountains.
* **Water Features** - Swimming pool details, drainage details, artificial lakes, and ponds.
* **Outdoor Hardscape** - Paving block textures, garden benches, street lamps, and fence blocks.

### 6. [CAD Machinery](https://cadbull.com/Autocad-Machinery-Blocks-&-DWG-Models)
Mechanical CAD assemblies and engineering components:
* **Power & Transmission** - Gears, engines, pulleys, shaft couplings, and motor blocks.
* **Valves & Pipes** - Hydraulic details, pipe connections, flanges, and high-pressure valves.
* **Automotive Design** - Vehicle assemblies, steering mechanisms, and chassis dimensions.

### 7. [Electrical CAD](https://cadbull.com/Electrical-Cad)
Power grid layouts and domestic schematics:
* **Power Distribution** - Main panel layouts, DB layouts, wire runs, and conduit details.
* **Lighting Schematics** - Ceiling light plans, outdoor lightning protection, and switch systems.
* **Telecommunications** - LAN server layouts, fire alarm systems, and CCTV layouts.

### 8. [Urban Design](https://cadbull.com/Urban-design)
Large-scale site planning maps and civic layouts:
* **Subdivisions** - Large plot layout maps, road junctions, and residential townships.
* **Infrastructure** - Road cross-sections, bridges, flyover details, and rainwater harvesting drawings.

---

## Systematic Indexing & Sitemaps

To index or parse all 200,000+ detailed product description pages and individual download urls programmatically, please refer directly to our XML sitemaps:

- **Static Pages Index**: `https://cadbull.com/api/sitemaps/static`
- **Categories Sitemap**: `https://cadbull.com/api/sitemaps/categories`
- **Dynamic Products Sitemap Index**: `https://cadbull.com/sitemap.xml`
